    • Class model.users.Student

      class Student extends model.users.User implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • courses
          List<model.academic.Course> courses
          List of registered courses.
        • credits
          int credits
          Total amount of registered credits.
        • failCount
          int failCount
          Number of failed courses.
        • gpa
          double gpa
          Current GPA of the student.
        • major
          String major
          Student major/specialization.
        • marks
          Map<model.academic.Course,model.academic.Mark> marks
          Map storing marks for each course.
        • organization
          model.users.StudentOrganization organization
          Organization joined by the student.
        • researchProfile
          model.research.ResearchDecorator researchProfile
          Research profile of the student. Null if the student is not a researcher.
        • studentId
          String studentId
          Unique student identifier.
        • subscribedJournals
          List<model.research.Journal> subscribedJournals
          List of subscribed scientific journals.
        • transcript
          model.academic.Transcript transcript
          Student transcript containing all marks.
        • year
          int year
          Current year of study.

      class StudentOrganization extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • head
          model.users.Student head
        • members
          List<model.users.Student> members
        • name
          String name

    • Class model.users.Teacher

      class Teacher extends model.users.Employee implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • courses
          List<model.academic.Course> courses
          Courses assigned to the teacher.
        • position
          model.enums.TeacherType position
          Teacher academic position.
        • rating
          double rating
          Average teacher rating.
        • ratingCount
          int ratingCount
          Number of submitted ratings.
        • researchProfile
          model.research.ResearchDecorator researchProfile
          Research profile of the teacher. Null if teacher is not a researcher.
        • subscribedJournals
          List<model.research.Journal> subscribedJournals
          Journals subscribed by the teacher.
